name: @tacogips/google-speech-to-text-addon
description: Transcribe local audio with Google Cloud Speech-to-Text v1 long-running recognition.

capabilities.name: process.spawn
capabilities.reason: runs curl and node to upload audio, start long-running recognition, and poll the operation

capabilities.name: network.egress
capabilities.reason: uploads audio to Cloud Storage and calls speech.googleapis.com

capabilities.name: filesystem.read
capabilities.reason: reads the audio file submitted to Google Speech-to-Text

capabilities.name: filesystem.write
capabilities.reason: writes transcripts, captions, raw response, and output JSON

capabilities.name: env.read
capabilities.reason: reads explicit Google authentication environment bindings
